parameters.jsCode:
const html = $input.first().json.html;

const text = html
  .replace(/<h3>/gi, '\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n')
  .replace(/<\/h3>/gi, '\n')
  .replace(/<ul>/gi, '')
  .replace(/<\/ul>/gi, '')
  .replace(/<li>/gi, '• ')
  .replace(/<\/li>/gi, '\n')
  .replace(/<strong>(.*?)<\/strong>/gi, '$1')
  .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '')
  .replace(/&/g, '&')
  .replace(/</g, '<')
  .replace(/>/g, '>')
  .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n')
  .trim();

return [{ json: { smsText: text } }];
